main_figures: GenomeCF resource overview. GenomeCF combines counterfactual stress tests on core real-data tasks, external biological assays, GenomeCF-Synth mechanism tasks, and a software/reporting stack designed for reusable community evaluation.

Held-out AUROC versus three GenomeCF axes on the four core human tasks. High AUROC does not guarantee low reverse-complement instability, biologically sensible shuffle behavior or good calibration. Task labels are Pr = Promoters, EC = Enhancers (Cohn), EE = Enhancers (Ensembl), and OCR = Open chromatin.

Foundation-model comparison on the focal tasks. Top: frozen DNABERT-2 and Caduceus-Ph official AUROC and reverse-complement instability. Bottom: completed interventions on the same models. Temperature scaling improves calibration, whereas matched-negative-trained heads alter matched-test AUROC and sometimes trade off official performance for confounder-controlled robustness.

External biological validation. Left, official and worst-bin assay-family results across TF-binding, histone-mark and MPRA variant-effect tasks. Right, external biological reliability is better explained by GenomeCF counterfactual metrics than by held-out core AUROC alone.

MPRA biological case studies. Case A shows that GenomeCF changes configuration choice on the BCL11A enhancer MPRA task by favoring a temperature-scaled CNN over the default CNN. Case B shows that GenomeCF changes model choice on the MYC enhancer MPRA task by favoring DNABERT-2 for top-ranked variant nomination even though the 6-mer baseline has stronger global AUROC and AUPRC.
GenomeCF-Synth. The top row revisits the planted-motif benchmark; the bottom row adds shortcut-conflict tasks that separate rule-following from shortcut-following behavior.

files.description: Schematic panel and artifact mapping for the resource overview.
Official-split AUROC, RC instability, shuffle response and calibration values for the core tradeoff figure.
Foundation-model official and intervention results in long format for the main comparison figure.
Assay-family summary metrics for the left-hand panel of the external validation figure.
Model-configuration-task prediction points for the external reliability analysis.
Regression, LOFO and permutation summaries for external prediction analyses.
Case-study metrics for BCL11A and MYC MPRA decision-change panels.
GenomeCF-Synth task metrics for shortcut and rule-following comparisons.
